__note: Real WebSocket messages captured from wss://ws-subscriptions-clob.polymarket.com/ws/market on 2026-04-16 after subscribing to an active sports market. IDs shortened.
notes: All numeric fields in WS messages are JSON STRINGS, not numbers (unlike Gamma REST where lastTradePrice/bestBid/bestAsk are numbers).
The first message after subscribing is an array of book snapshots (one per subscribed asset_id).
Subsequent price_change messages arrive as plain objects.
last_trade_price arrives as a plain object and carries the latest executed trade price as a string.
Send PING every ~10s to keep the connection alive; server responds PONG.
custom_feature_enabled:true is NOT required for book/price_change — only for the optional best_bid_ask/new_market/market_resolved events.
